channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Hashdex’s diversified crypto ETF adds options for hedging, income generation
item.description: Options on Hashdex’s diversified NCIQ ETF now let investors hedge, generate income and manage risk across a broad basket of digital assets.

item.title: Nakamoto sells $20 million in Bitcoin and cuts Metaplanet stake
item.description: David Bailey's Nakamoto plans to wind down healthcare operations as it shifts focus to integrating BTC Inc and UTXO Management.

item.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock valued at $1.1 billion in Series C led by SC Ventures
item.description: The Brussels-based digital asset firm said the new capital will bolster its balance sheet and support expansion and acquisitions.

item.title: Democrats press CFTC, ethics watchdog on prediction market insider trading
item.description: Prediction markets are facing increasing scrutiny over allegations of insider trading, prompting Kalshi and Polymarket to plan guardrails to curb potential incidents.

item.title: Bitcoin demand falters as 'real' interest rates surge
item.description: Rising U.S. real yields, especially on 10-year TIPS, pose a headwind to zero-yielding risk assets like bitcoin.

item.title: Crypto exchange KuCoin agrees to $500K settlement, ending CFTC case
item.description: KuCoin’s parent will pay $500,000 to settle CFTC charges following a separate $300 million penalty in a DOJ case over similar conduct.

item.title: Quantum computers need fewer qubits to crack crypto than thought: Google
item.description: Google has updated its estimates of the quantum computing resources needed to break elliptic curve cryptography.

item.title: Dubai sets formal rules for crypto exchange-traded derivatives
item.description: Dubai’s VARA has set formal rules for crypto exchange-traded derivatives, allowing retail access under suitability checks, margin controls and leverage limits.

item.title: Bitcoin holds $67,500 as Trump signals he may end Iran war with Hormuz still shut
item.description: Equity futures rallied and oil erased gains on the report, but the S&P 500 is on its longest losing streak since 2022 and MSCI Asia Pacific is heading for its worst month since 2008.

item.title: New US Rule Seeks to Open $8T Retirement Market to Crypto
item.description: The safe harbor proposal would allow 401(k) managers to offer crypto-linked funds with stronger legal protections.

item.title: Bitmine scoops $147M of ETH in its biggest week of buying this year
item.description: Bitmine bought over 71,000 Ether over the past week, adding to the 238,244 Ether it acquired over the previous four weeks.

item.title: Maryland man charged in $50 million Uranium Finance hack after U.S. seized $31 million in crypto
item.description: Prosecutors say Jonathan Spalletta exploited smart contract bugs twice in April 2021, laundering funds through Tornado Cash and spending proceeds on rare collectibles.

item.title: New supply chain attack this time for npm axios, the most popular HTTP client library with 300M weekly downloads. Scanning my system I found a use imported from googleworkspace/cli from a few days ago when I was experimenting with gmail/gcal cli. The in - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBWbDh4SzYzbTlQSHZzYUl4M2k5LWt5UW54enRxNndUZ3ZGOXI0SHRMUVBzRzdFRzE1dW5BZjJwTFA3cnRwSEhfMkF6aXp6dEZxVEVXY3ZRazNWNEkyRWc?oc=5" target="_blank">New supply chain attack this time for n…

item.title: KuCoin operator barred from U.S. after CFTC order, following $297 million DOJ case
item.description: KuCoin operator Peken Global Limited cannot cater to U.S. users on its platform unless it registers as a foreign board of trade.

item.title: Today is a monumentous day for quantum computing and cryptography. Two breakthrough papers just landed (links in next tweet). Both papers improve Shor's algorithm, infamous for cracking RSA and elliptic curve cryptography. The two results compound, op - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1feXJMUGUydjV6S1ViUVJiU1U1YzNxcUxFWFpfZk9TMlZLQTc0X3NObkZZRHFCV0pDUEx6UmlRWnliNTRleVRpYnB2S1ZtdV9PSGpDclRBRWI4LWhBQXUtLWplOA?oc=5" target="_blank">Today is a monumentous day for q…

item.title: US Charges Hacker Behind $53 Million Uranium Finance Exploit
item.description: The Uranium Finance indictment carries potential prison time of up to 30 years for fraud and money laundering counts.

item.title: Breaking Bitcoin with quantum may be easier than thought, with Taproot partly to blame, Google says
item.description: The findings suggest attackers could one day steal bitcoin mid-transaction, challenging assumptions that the threat is decades away.

item.title: US Labor Department takes step toward including crypto in 401(k)s
item.description: The proposed rule change seeks to enable Americans to invest in products like crypto that better reflect the current investment landscape, Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer said.

item.title: US senators question SEC over enforcement chief exit, Justin Sun case
item.description: A report from Reuters earlier this month claimed that the SEC's former chief of enforcement clashed with agency leadership over cases involving those in Trump's orbit before resigning.

item.title: 🚨 CRITICAL: Active supply chain attack on axios -- one of npm's most depended-on packages. The latest [email protected] now pulls in [email protected], a package that did not exist before today. This is a live compromise. This is textbook supply chain installer - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE94U2pzTDVIdDRFbjdsQkVINjJ5Tjh1Y2JfZk5Ec0hHUVdGN0dfdFNsZWlCOVM5ODQzOTdrOTloVVJRY29OMXNrVVlRcUJNWHNqSDc3YjRHRGxjMGM?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 CRITICAL: Active supply chain attack on …

item.title: Alleged $54M Uranium Finance hacker faces 30 years in prison
item.description: Prosecutors allege the stolen funds were used to purchase collectibles, including Pokémon cards, antique Roman coins and a piece of fabric from the Wright brothers' plane.

item.title: Oil hits three-year high above $105: Will Bitcoin crash again?
item.description: Historical data shows Bitcoin bear markets deepening when oil prices rally to record highs. Will Monday’s $105 WTI price lead to a BTC crash?

item.title: US senators float ‘Mined in America Act’ to boost BTC mining manufacturing
item.description: While the US hosts 38% of Bitcoin’s hashrate, 97% of mining machines are made by two Chinese companies, according to a Bitcoin policy advocate.

item.title: Bitcoin data points to rare trading setup for relief rally to $71K
item.description: A notable bid-ask imbalance for Bitcoin exists near $66,000, possibly raising the chance for a relief rally to $71,000.

item.title: Peter Brandt, Polymarket traders don’t see new Bitcoin highs this year
item.description: Polymarket pundits are giving just a 15% chance that Bitcoin will reclaim $120,000 in 2026, while veteran trader Peter Brandt said he doesn't expect a new high until Q2 2027.

item.title: Senator Questions SEC Over Treatment of Trump-Linked Crypto Businesses
item.description: Senator Richard Blumenthal wants the agency to answer whether it softened enforcement against allies of President Donald Trump.

item.title: U.S. rule change may open trillions in 401(k) funds to crypto
item.description: The Labor Department on Monday proposed a rule following an executive order from President Donald Trump that directed regulators to expand access to digital assets in retirement portfolios.

item.title: Price predictions 3/30: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, HYPE
item.description: Bitcoin and altcoins sold off as the Monday US market open reflected traders’ fear over oil prices, US employment data and the future of the ​​US and Israel-Iran war.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Democrats urge warnings to federal officials against insider bets on prediction markets
item.description: Members of the House and Senate asked the CFTC and federal ethics office to remind government employees it's illegal to make insider derivatives trades.

item.title: Microsoft Made GPT and Claude Work Together—And the Result Beats Every AI Research Tool Out There
item.description: Microsoft's Copilot Researcher now puts GPT and Claude to work in sequence—and the combination just outscored every AI system around.

item.title: Senators Reveal 'Mined in America' Bill to Boost Bitcoin Mining, Support Trump's Reserve
item.description: Sens. Bill Cassidy and Cynthia Lummis introduced legislation to support Bitcoin miners, arguing that the industry needs government help.

item.title: NFL asks prediction markets to act on ‘easily manipulated’ bets
item.description: CFTC Chair Michael Selig signaled that the agency would defer to the football league in calling for changes to event contracts that could be manipulated by a single person.

item.title: Why Consensus is crypto’s new ground zero
item.description: A decade of building is paying off. Massive Institutional presence, deep focus on agentic commerce make the event in Miami one for the ages.

item.title: Chainlink Labs, Anchorage Digital Back New Crypto Super PAC Ahead of Midterms
item.description: The Blockchain Leadership Fund is a new hybrid PAC launched to support pro-crypto candidates in the 2026 midterm elections.

item.title: Hyperliquid whale opens $53M Bitcoin short: Should traders take notice?
item.description: A $53 million Bitcoin short on Hyperliquid highlights bearish positioning as traders navigate geopolitical risks, regulation concerns and macro data.

item.title: Fed's Powell's comments sooth bond market, but oil continues rise, hitting crypto and stocks
item.description: WTI crude oil closed above $100 per barrel for the first time since 2002.

item.title: Bitcoin Flashes 'Warning Sign' With Nearly Half of BTC Supply Sitting at a Loss: Report
item.description: Almost half of the Bitcoin supply is sitting at a loss, analysts said, as the top crypto asset remains about 47% off its all-time high.

item.title: Square rolls out Bitcoin payments at POS for eligible US merchants
item.description: Rolling out over the coming month, a Block executive said Bitcoin payments at point-of-sale will be automatically enabled and settled in US dollars by default.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Stakes More ETH, Boosting Total to $50 Million
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation staked another $46 million ETH as part of its new treasury plan unveiled last year.

item.title: Qwen 3.5 Omni: Alibaba’s AI Model Can Now Hear, Watch, and Clone Your Voice
item.description: Qwen3.5-Omni, Alibaba's omnimodal AI, now handles voice cloning, 10-hour audio, real-time web search, and beats Gemini on audio benchmarks—all in one model.

item.title: Mitsubishi adopts JPMorgan blockchain for corporate payments
item.description: Mitsubishi plans to use JPMorgan’s Kinexys network for global payments as the bank targets $10 billion in daily blockchain transaction volume.

item.title: Chainlink and Anchorage Digital back launch of crypto-aligned PAC
item.description: Ahead of the November midterm elections, backers are lining up behind a new hybrid political action committee that allows contributions directly to candidates.

item.title: Jack Dorsey's Square Automatically Enables Bitcoin Payments for Millions of Sellers
item.description: Block-owned payment processor Square has shifted Bitcoin acceptance from opt-in to opt-out for eligible sellers.

item.title: Coinbase, Robinhood and Figure Stocks Are 60% Off Their Peaks—Bernstein Says Buy the Dip
item.description: Bernstein sees a buying opportunity in crypto stocks trading ~60% off their 2025 peaks, even as Q1 earnings look weak.

item.title: Bluesky Users Revolt Against AI Tool Attie, Blocking It More Than ICE and White House Accounts
item.description: Bluesky's new AI tool Attie drew swift backlash from users wary of automation—a very different vibe than on Elon Musk's X.

item.title: Jack Dorsey’s Square auto-enables bitcoin payments for millions of U.S. businesses
item.description: The new rollout converts BTC to dollars by default for small businesses, aiming to embed bitcoin into everyday commerce without added friction.

item.title: Ethereum Funds Shed $222 Million as Crypto Bill Fears Rattle Investors
item.description: Ethereum funds took the biggest hit as Clarity Act fears and macro headwinds pushed crypto outflows to $414 million for the week.

item.title: Trump-backed American Bitcoin hits 7,000 BTC as holdings expand rapidly
item.description: Satoshis per share climbs past 660, reinforcing rapid treasury expansion since Nasdaq debut.

item.title: Trump Brothers' American Bitcoin Hits BTC Milestone as Stock Falls to Lowest Price Since IPO
item.description: The Trump brothers' Bitcoin mining firm, American Bitcoin, now holds over 7,000 BTC—but shares are down 94% from the post-IPO peak.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation Backs 'Economic Zone' to Solve Fragmentation Issues
item.description: Gnosis and Zisk proposed a framework for aligning infrastructure within the Ethereum ecosystem, specifically layer-2 scaling networks.

item.title: Automatically enabled bitcoin payments are rolling out to eligible U.S. Square sellers. Start accepting bitcoin that instantly converts to cash at checkout, with no additional setup. → 0% processing fees through 2026 → Near-instant settlement → No need to hold - x.com

item.title: Our plans to build a blockchain-based shared ledger have reached a major new milestone. After completing its design phase with a global group of banks, we are now shaping the ledger’s first MVP iteration, which will enable interoperability between banks’ to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE15cmwwSTRITXREcHBIcjFxU1JNQU5wRWRFeHJQSG9QTWNuT0tjSS1HbkNESlZ3MlM0U01GN09mbWVUc19fckRvYmFFRjJPcjVWZllzZWJxeVRHWU0wcUJBb0pzeXlQZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Our plans to build a blockch…

item.title: Bitcoin hashrate posts first-quarter drop for first time in 6 years as miners pivot to AI
item.description: The first-quarter decline breaks a long-standing growth trend, but could ultimately support decentralization as public U.S. miners face losing dominance.

item.title: From the Battlefield to the Blockchain: How Cryptocurrency Is Helping Finance the Drone Revolution
item.description: TL;DR Low-cost, commercially available drones have become central to modern conflict, allowing state and non-state actors, such as pro-Russia militias… The post From the Battlefield to the Blockchain: How Cryptocurrency Is Helping Finance …

item.title: The SEC’s latest crypto guidance still leaves too much unsaid
item.description: The regulatory agency’s reset is real, but the new details stop short of the full course correction the industry needs, say Gibson Dunn attorneys.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Adds More Ethereum as Strategy Takes a Break From Bitcoin Buying
item.description: BitMine continued its Ethereum accumulation, adding to its leading ETH treasury while Strategy took a week off from Bitcoin purchases.

item.title: Bitmine makes biggest ether purchase in 2026 while other digital asset treasuries pull back
item.description: Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury bought more than 71,000 ETH over the past week, remaining the sole large corporate crypto buyer as Strategy broke its 13-week bitcoin purchase streak.
